title: Need to support status count of zero in the bar chart widget
excerpt: If we are tracking subitems (tasks) move through a series of steps. Once everything is “Done” all the other status’ disappear from the bar chart widget because their count is 0. The Bar Chart only show the status with a …

posts.author: gpontecorvo (Guy Pontecorvo)
posts.cookedHtml: If we are tracking subitems (tasks) move through a series of steps. Once everything is “Done” all the other status’ disappear from the bar chart widget because their count is 0. The Bar Chart only show the status with a count which is not reassuring to the stakeholders who ask why are you only showing the ones that are done? How many are “In progress”, or “not started” etc… The work around is to create graphs in Excel. Groan!

posts.author: Bree (Bree)
posts.cookedHtml:
Do you have this option selected?
